testcase.name: test_create_preventivo_with_classe_esecuzione

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'EXC3' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf86faa22e540>('classe_esecuzione') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf86faa22e540> = {'acconto': 0, 'banca': None, 'client_id': None, 'compliance_detail': {'all_compliant': None, 'checked_lines': 0, 'results': []}, ...}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration76_features.py:121: in test_create_preventivo_with_classe_esecuzione assert data.get("classe_esecuzione") == "EXC3" E AssertionError: assert None == 'EXC3' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf86faa22e540>('classe_esecuzione') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf86faa22e540> = {'acconto': 0, 'banca': None, 'client_id': None, 'compliance_detail': {'all_compliant': None, 'checked_lines': 0, 'results': []}, ...}.get

testcase.name: test_update_preventivo_classe_esecuzione

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == 'EXC4' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf86fa9f03580>('classe_esecuzione') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf86fa9f03580> = {'acconto': 0, 'banca': None, 'client_id': None, 'compliance_detail': {'all_compliant': None, 'checked_lines': 0, 'results': []}, ...}.get + where {'acconto': 0, 'banca': None, 'client_id': None, 'compliance_detail': {'all_compliant': None, 'checked_lines': 0, 'results': []}, ...} = json() + where json = <Response [200]>.json

testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration76_features.py:164: in test_update_preventivo_classe_esecuzione assert get_resp.json().get("classe_esecuzione") == "EXC4" E AssertionError: assert None == 'EXC4' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf86fa9f03580>('classe_esecuzione') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xf86fa9f03580> = {'acconto': 0, 'banca': None, 'client_id': None, 'compliance_detail': {'all_compliant': None, 'checked_lines': 0, 'results': []}, ...}.get E + where {'acconto': 0, 'banca': None, 'client_id': None, 'compliance_detail': {'all_compliant': None, 'checked_lines': 0, 'results': []}, ...} = json() E + where json = <Response [200]>.json
